name: Dragunity Falchion
name_jp: ドラグニティ－ファルシオン
desc: You can banish this card from your hand or GY, then target 1 "Dragunity" monster you control; equip 1 Dragon "Dragunity" monster from your Deck or GY to it as an Equip Spell. You can send this card equipped to a "Dragunity" monster to the GY, then target 1 face-up card your opponent controls; banish it. You can only use each effect of "Dragunity Falchion" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can banish this card from your hand or GY, then target 1 "Dragunity" monster you control; equip 1 Dragon "Dragunity" monster from your Deck or GY to it as an Equip Spell. You can send this card equipped to a "Dragunity" monster to the GY, then target 1 face-up card your opponent controls; banish it. You can only use each effect of "Dragunity Falchion" once per turn.
eff: You can banish this card from your hand or GY, then target 1 "Dragunity" monster you control; equip 1 Dragon "Dragunity" monster from your Deck or GY to it as an Equip Spell. You can send this card equipped to a "Dragunity" monster to the GY, then target 1 face-up card your opponent controls; banish it. You can only use each effect of "Dragunity Falchion" once per turn.

action: Equips monsters from the player's Deck
Equips monsters from the player's Graveyard
Sends itself from field to Graveyard for cost
banished: Banishes itself from hand for cost
Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
